title: Tabulation characters should be avoided
description: Tabulation characters should not be usedAnalyze your codeconsistency-formattedmaintainabilityCode SmellconventionWhy is this an issue?The tab width can differ from one development environment to another. Using tabs may require other developers to configure their environment (text editor, preferences, etc.) to read source code.That is why using spaces is preferable.Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CIDeveloper EditionAvailable Since9.1©2025SonarSource Sàrl. checks.message: Tabulation characters should be avoided - use spaces for indentation instead
